mechanism_narrative: Positive retail-sales momentum signals improving household cash-flow demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms; higher 3-month growth in RSAFS predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest available vintage for 2010-02-01 was 355546.0
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS 3-month growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day returns over any 3-year rolling window or positive-momentum months do not exceed baseline hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: A renewed rise in unemployment signals weakening income, higher default risk, and lower earnings expectations; when UNRATE deteriorates sharply, S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days are negative.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 3-month moving average by more than 0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available vintage for 2010-02-01 was 9.7 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered return is not below unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Near-zero policy rates combined with contained consumer inflation reduce discount rates without forcing imminent tightening; FEDFUNDS at the lower bound and subdued CPIAUCSL inflation predict positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available vintage for 2010-02-01 was 0.13
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-rate low-inflation state has lower average 20-day returns than other states or if its 20-day hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production acceleration signals inventory rebuilding and operating leverage in cyclical sectors; consecutive positive INDPRO releases predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO monthly change is positive for two consecutive releases
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available vintage for 2010-02-01 was 100.9862
failure_condition: Reject if two-release INDPRO gains are followed by negative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of observations or if average triggered return is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: Very weak housing starts signal impaired credit creation and depressed durable-goods demand; when HOUST falls below a low activity threshold, S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days are negative.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below 600 thousand annualized units
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest available vintage for 2010-01-01 was 591.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below 600 is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if downside returns are not larger than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth paired with falling unemployment confirms broad labor-income repair rather than statistical noise; PAYEMS gains and UNRATE declines jointly predict positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest available vintage for 2010-02-01 was 129526.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-up unemployment-down state does not improve 20-day hit rate versus PAYEMS alone and UNRATE alone by at least 5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration while policy rates remain pinned near zero raises tightening-risk and margin-pressure expectations; rising CPIAUCSL with low FEDFUNDS predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized change crosses above 3.5% while FEDFUNDS <= 0.25
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest available vintage for 2010-01-01 was 217.587
failure_condition: Reject if triggered high-inflation low-rate observations have nonnegative average 60-day returns or if drawdown frequency is not above the unconditional frequency.

mechanism_narrative: A return to positive real GDP growth after contraction confirms aggregate-demand recovery and reduces recession-risk premia; GDPC1 growth crossing above zero predicts positive 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above 0%
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest available vintage for 2009-10-01 was 13161.1
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth crossings fail to produce higher 60-day average returns than negative-growth quarters or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.
